---
title: "Dr Kevin Mansfield FSLL"
subtitle: Associate Professor, UCL Institute for Environmental Design and Engineering
image: sidebar/my_image.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: rounded
  id: hero-heading
  
header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/about.css">
resources: 
  - ../assets/about.css
---

::: {#hero-heading}

<div class="h2">Welcome</div>

I have spent most of my working life researching and teaching light and lighting in the built environment.

My research interests span architectural lighting, the human response to lighting and the impact of lighting at urban, architectural and object scales.

On this **website**, you will find a selection of my published works, including scholarly articles, and news and updates on my current research projects.

:::

### Contact

Please feel free to [contact me](mailto:kevin.mansfield@ucl.ac.uk) if you have any questions or would like to discuss potential projects.
